### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1982%E2%80%9383_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Foresta Fălticeni* was renamed as [Chimia Fălticeni](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni").

*Zimbrul Suceava* was moved from [Suceava](/wiki/Suceava "Suceava") to [Siret](/wiki/Siret "Siret") and was renamed as [Zimbrul Siret](/w/index.php?title=Zimbrul_Siret&action=edit&redlink=1 "Zimbrul Siret (page does not exist)").

*Victoria IRA Bacău* was renamed as [Aripile Bacău](/wiki/Aripile_Bac%C4%83u "Aripile Bacău").

*Metalul Sfântu Gheorghe* was renamed as [Electro Sfântu Gheorghe](/w/index.php?title=Electro_Sf%C3%A2ntu_Gheorghe&action=edit&redlink=1 "Electro Sfântu Gheorghe (page does not exist)").

*Foresta Gugești* was renamed as [Victoria Gugești](/w/index.php?title=Victoria_Guge%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Victoria Gugești (page does not exist)").

*Ferodoul Râmnicu Sărat* was renamed as [Olimpia Râmnicu Sărat](/wiki/Olimpia_R%C3%A2mnicu_S%C4%83rat "Olimpia Râmnicu Sărat").

*Vâscoza București* was renamed as [Viscofil București](/w/index.php?title=Viscofil_Bucure%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Viscofil București (page does not exist)").

*CFR Victoria Caransebeș* was renamed as [CFR Caransebeș](/w/index.php?title=CFR_Caransebe%C8%99&action=edit&redlink=1 "CFR Caransebeș (page does not exist)").

*Explormin Deva* was renamed as [Explorări Deva](/wiki/Explor%C4%83ri_Deva "Explorări Deva").

*Minerul Ilba-Seini* was renamed as [Unirea Seini](/w/index.php?title=Unirea_Seini&action=edit&redlink=1 "Unirea Seini (page does not exist)").

### Other changes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1982%E2%80%9383_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Other changes")]

[Siretul Pașcani](/w/index.php?title=Siretul_Pa%C8%99cani&action=edit&redlink=1 "Siretul Pașcani (page does not exist)") took the place of [Nicolina Iași](/w/index.php?title=Nicolina_Ia%C8%99i&action=edit&redlink=1 "Nicolina Iași (page does not exist)").

[Petrolul Brăila](/w/index.php?title=Petrolul_Br%C4%83ila&action=edit&redlink=1 "Petrolul Brăila (page does not exist)") took the place of [Șantierul Naval ITA Brăila](/w/index.php?title=%C8%98antierul_Naval_ITA_Br%C4%83ila&action=edit&redlink=1 "Șantierul Naval ITA Brăila (page does not exist)").

[Șoimii Cernavodă](/wiki/%C8%98oimii_Cernavod%C4%83 "Șoimii Cernavodă") was spared from relegation due to the merge between [FCM Galați](/wiki/FCM_Dun%C4%83rea_Gala%C8%9Bi "FCM Dunărea Galați") and [CSU Galați](/wiki/CSU_Dun%C4%83rea_de_Jos_Gala%C8%9Bi "CSU Dunărea de Jos Galați").
